/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-undefined -Wl,dynamic_lookup -Wl,-single_module -compatibility_version 4.0.0 -current_version 4.0.0 -o ../lib/libHepMCfio.4.0.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libHepMCfio.4.dylib CMakeFiles/HepMCfio.dir/HEPEVT_Wrapper.cc.o CMakeFiles/HepMCfio.dir/HerwigWrapper.cc.o CMakeFiles/HepMCfio.dir/IO_HEPEVT.cc.o CMakeFiles/HepMCfio.dir/IO_HERWIG.cc.o
